manifest_entry.name: OpenAI Codex
manifest_entry.focus: agent workflows and parallel task UX
teaches: how to explain multi-step AI work clearly
avoid: using overly technical framing for general audiences
hiding agent behavior behind abstract marketing copy
manifest_entry.why_this_matters: Useful when designing AI products that behave more like workers than chatbots.
manifest_entry.reusable_lesson: Agent UX should explain workflow and outputs clearly, not just the intelligence behind them.
